# Vendored Ghostty Swift layer

The Swift sources in this directory (except `Shims.swift`, which is
SideTerminal's own adapter) are vendored from
[Ghostty](https://github.com/ghostty-org/ghostty)'s macOS app layer, with light
adaptations (explicit imports, SideTerminal-specific shims). They remain under
Ghostty's MIT License:

> Copyright (c) 2024 Mitchell Hashimoto, Ghostty contributors
>
> Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy
> of this software and associated documentation files (the "Software"), to deal
> in the Software without restriction … The above copyright notice and this
> permission notice shall be included in all copies or substantial portions of
> the Software.

Full text: see `THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES.md` at the repository root.
